title: 20:30 ГўВҖВ” August 31, 2020
body_text:
20:30 ГўВҖВ” August 31, 2020
Update to the Wires and Funds Transfers Parts
We updated the Wires Part to reflect recent changes to the Wires application functionality, including near real-time settlement for BC and Ontario financial institutions and application behaviour for wires related to high risk/tax haven, sanctioned, or prohibited countries. We also updated the Part to clarify existing functionality.
We updated the Funds Transfers Part to reflect the near real-time settlement for BC and Ontario financial institutions in MTS. In addition, all references to the ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ were updated to reflect the service name change to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Form 2592 was updated from ГўВҖВңRequest for MTS Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting ScreensГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңRequest for Wires Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting ScreensГўВҖВқ to reflect the service name change.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.3, Wires Document Library
We updated the title of Form 2592 from ГўВҖВңRequest for MTS Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting ScreensГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңRequest for Wires Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting Screens.ГўВҖВқ
Section 2.1, Definitions
We updated the list of primary identification required by FINTRAC.
Section 8.3, Completing the BeneficiaryГўВҖВҷs Financial Institution Section
We updated the Section to describe the Wires application behaviour when the beneficiaryГўВҖВҷs financial institution is on the list of high risk/tax haven, sanctioned, or prohibited countries.
Section 8.5, Completing the Sender Section
We updated the Section to describe the Wires application behaviour when the senderГўВҖВҷs or third partyГўВҖВҷs country of residence is on the list of high risk/tax haven, sanctioned, or prohibited countries.
Section 8.6, Completing the Beneficiary Section
We updated the Section to describe the Wires application behaviour when the beneficiaryГўВҖВҷs country of residence is on the list of high risk/tax haven, sanctioned, or prohibited countries.
Section 8.8 Completing the Regulatory Section
We updated the Regulatory Section to include the question ГўВҖВңIs this transaction face-to-face?ГўВҖВқ.
Section 9.3, Completing the Beneficiary Financial Institution Section
We updated the Section to describe the Wires application behaviour when the beneficiaryГўВҖВҷs financial institution is on the list of high risk/tax haven, sanctioned, or prohibited countries for Bank to Bank wires.
Section 10.4, Printing a Submitted Wire Receipt
We added a Section describing functionality that allows users to print a submitted wire receipt at any time.
Section 11.1, Overview of Editing Outgoing Wires
We corrected the example in the overview that incorrectly had ГўВҖВңamountГўВҖВқ as a reason a wire may be edited. The example conflicted with the correct list of fields that can be edited included in Section 1.2, Editing Outgoing Wires.
We removed the following statement: ГўВҖВңAfter a wire is edited, there is no way for other users to see that it has been changed.ГўВҖВқ This statement is no longer true. See update to Section 11.2, Editing Outgoing Wires.
Section 11.2, Editing Outgoing Wires
We added a description for new functionality that displays the date and time of the most recent edit and the user ID of the individual who made the change in the Transaction Information Section.
Section 12.1, Overview of Approving Outgoing Wires
We clarified the approval requirements for outgoing wires.
Section 13.1 Cancelling and Recalling Outgoing Wires
We updated the procedures detailing when a wire can be cancelled in the Wires application and when a (best effort) recall request should be submitted via ServiceNow.
Section 14.1, Settlement of Outgoing Wires
We provided details for the near real-time Wires settlement for outgoing wires for BC and Ontario financial institutions.
Section 18.1, Settlement of Incoming Wires
We provided details on the near real-time Wires settlement for incoming wires for BC and Ontario financial institutions.
Funds Transfers Part
Section 1.6, Funds Transfers Document Library
We updated the title of Form 2592 from ГўВҖВңRequest for MTS Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting ScreensГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңRequest for Wires Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting Screens.ГўВҖВқ
Section 2.1, Definitions
We updated the list of primary identification required by FINTRAC.
Section 4.8, Policy on Using the Wires Data Extract Service (BC, Manitoba, and Ontario Credit Unions Only)
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section, 4.9, Policy on Enabling the MTS Reporting Screens
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section 5.5, Enabling the MTS Reporting Screens
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section 5.6, Enrolling in the MTS Wires Data Extract Service (BC, Manitoba, and Ontario Credit Unions Only)
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section 10.7, Receiving Incoming Transfers on MTS
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section 10.15, Settlement of Incoming Transfers
We provided details for the near real-time Wires settlement for outgoing wires for BC and Ontario financial institutions.
Section 12.4, Completing the Outgoing Funds Transfer Request
We updated all ГўВҖВңMTS Data Extract ServiceГўВҖВқ references to ГўВҖВңWires Data Extract Service.ГўВҖВқ
Section 13.16, Settlement of Outgoing Transfers
We provided details for the near real-time Wires settlement for outgoing wires for BC and Ontario financial institutions.
Document Library
Status
Request for Wires Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting Screens
2592
We updated the Form title from ГўВҖВңRequest for MTS Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting ScreensГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңRequest for Wires Data Extract Service or MTS Reporting Screens.ГўВҖВқ
Revised
